titleStmt.title: Letter from Bishop Bernard Coyne to Fr. Michael O'Flanagan, 11 September 1917
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: Bishop Bernard Coyne

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p: Fr Michael O'Flanagan (1876-1926) was a Catholic priest and republican activist. The Bishop writes to forbid Fr. O'Flanagan from saying mass, unless he went on retreat to Roscrea or 'other suitable place'. The Bishop might then reconsider.

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
ST. Mary's, SLIGO
11th. Sept., 1917 Dear Fr. O'Flanagan, I regret to find that you still persist in disregarding and
openly flouting the grave instructions and solemn admonitions which I have
deemed it necessary to address to you from time to time - most especially
in my communications of the 14th. January, 1916, the 26th January, 1917,
and the 12th. March, 1917. Consequently I now find it my painful duty to
withdraw from you,- as I do hereby- all diocesan faculties which you have
at any time received, including the permission to say Mass. If, after a retreat in Roscrea or some other suitable place, you
give promise of amendment, I shall be prepared to reconsider your case,
but not otherwise.
I am,
Yours faithfully,
(Signed) BERNARD COYNE
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
